findings.description: The source notes "(オーバーロード)" after "引数は実行コンテキストのみとなる" for the handle() method. This notation indicates that handle(ExecutionContext ctx) in this class is an overload of the parent BatchAction's handle(InputData data, ExecutionContext ctx), which clarifies why the signature differs. The knowledge file omits this note.
findings.source_evidence: handle() | (必須実装) | ... 引数は実行コンテキストのみとなる。(オーバーロード)
